Notice Of Motion And Motion To Contest The Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Continued To Oct-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NADIA LAMA'S MOTION TO CONTEST THE GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT

Appearances: Tyler B. Rougeau of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley (650.989.5400) for defendant Nadia Lama; David W. Chen of Stratman Patterson & Hunter (510.457.3442) for defendants Claudia and Antoinette Lama; Michael Astanehe of the Tobener Law Center (415.504.2165) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff Deborah Follingstad

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Each side to submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Nancy Presant-McDonald, CSR 9906 of Atkinson Baker (818.551.7300)

Frederick A. Patterson, Esq. of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter (T: 510.457.3473) and
James W. Lucey, Esq. [appearing by telephone] of the Tobener Law Center (T: 415.504.2165) for the Plaintiff / Opposing Party Deborah Follingstad;
Paul S. Sheng, Esq. of Clapp Moroney, Vucinich, Beeman Scheley (T:650.989.5400) for the Defendant / Moving Party Nadia Lama.

DEFENDANT NADIA LAMA'S Motion To Contest The Good Faith Settlement is argued and taken under submission. The Court orders both parties to submit proposed orders. Defense counsel submits a proposed order in open court.
